title: Remote code execution via unsafe deserialization or eval instruction in agentic component
description: An agentic component instructs the agent to deserialize untrusted data using unsafe methods (pickle.loads, yaml.load without SafeLoader) or to evaluate dynamic code strings (eval, exec) from external sources. These operations are a reliable RCE vector — a crafted payload executes arbitrary code in the agent's execution environment with the agent's full privileges.
behavioral_fingerprint: Component instructs agent to deserialize untrusted input or evaluate dynamic code from external sources.
detection_methodology: 1. Static scan: flag instructions to eval, exec, execute code received from users, deserialize untrusted input, or unpickle external data. 2. Code execution sandboxing: sandbox all code execution with strict resource limits. 3. Input validation: reject deserialization of untrusted sources at the API level.
indicators_of_compromise: Component contains 'execute the code received from', 'deserialize untrusted input', 'run arbitrary code'
Unexpected process spawning following deserialization operations
Network connections or file writes initiated by deserialized payload
Agent reports errors consistent with malformed pickle or yaml payloads
remediation: 1. Never deserialize untrusted data using pickle, yaml.load, or similar unsafe methods. 2. Use safe alternatives: yaml.safe_load, json.loads, ast.literal_eval. 3. Never eval or exec strings from external sources. 4. Sandbox all code execution. 5. Audit all operations performed by the agent during the period it was active.
